CurrentIssues.ID: ReturnCount:Result.kt$suspend inline fun <T> (suspend () -> Result<T>).retryOnFailureWithAbort( times: Int = 5, initialDelaySeconds: Int = 3, noinline shouldRetry: suspend () -> Boolean = { true }, crossinline onRetry: ( attempt: Int, remainingAttempts: Int, delaySeconds: Int, error: Throwable, ) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _ -> }, ): Result<T>
